summary: Frontend-only testing for POI brand filter panel SVG icons feature. Verified all 43 filter IDs have corresponding 20x20 SVG icons in getPoiFilterIcon(), MapControls.tsx renders icons correctly next to clean text labels, filter panel opens/closes, toggle/Select All/Deselect All interactions work, and app loads without errors.

issues: Traffic Signs & Lights button (not a brand filter) still uses 🚦 emoji in label. Per feature request 'all emoji labels removed and replaced with clean text labels' — this item was not updated. Minor inconsistency if requirement meant ALL labels including this toggle.

action_items: OPTIONAL: The '🚦 Traffic Signs & Lights' toggle button in the filter panel still uses an emoji. If the feature requirement intended to remove ALL emojis including this toggle, update MapControls.tsx line 64 to remove the 🚦 emoji.
critical_code_review_comments: All 43 filter IDs in MapControls.tsx filter list have corresponding icon cases in getPoiFilterIcon() in PoiIcon.tsx — confirmed via code review and browser test.
Select All button (line 73) correctly lists all 34 brand IDs + 9 generic type IDs = 43 total — matches the filter list.
Icons use correct brand colors: Love's=red/yellow, Shell=yellow/red star, BP=green/yellow, Walmart=blue/yellow spark. All verified.
Filter panel width is w-48 md:w-64 as required (MapControls.tsx line 53).
Opacity/scale animation on hover and active states correctly implemented (line 151).
context_for_next_testing_agent: App at http://localhost:8001 (single Express+Vite SPA, no auth). Navigation view accessed by clicking 'Navigation' in left sidebar. Filter panel opens via [title='Filter POIs'] button (funnel icon) in the right-side controls panel (#nav-map-controls). Filter list is inside .overflow-y-auto scrollable container. All 43 brand/type filters verified with SVG icons. No auth required.

test_results.filter_items_render_icons_next_to_labels: PASS - 43/43 filter buttons have SVG elements
test_results.all_emoji_labels_removed_brand_filters: PASS - no emojis in brand filter labels
